mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profit ( workshop_id, program_id, monthly, total_amount, paid_status ) VALUES ( #{workshopId}, #{programId}, #{monthly}, #{totalPrice}, '정산대기' ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_amount = total_amount + #{totalPrice};
mapper.select: SELECT p.monthly, p.paid_status, SUM(p.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(p.commission_amt) AS commissionAmt, s.final_amount AS finalAmount, s.adjust_amount AS adjustAmount FROM profit p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT workshop_id, monthly, final_amount, adjust_amount FROM settlement WHERE adjust_check = TRUE GROUP BY workshop_id, monthly ) s ON p.workshop_id = s.workshop_id AND p.monthly = s.monthly WHERE p.workshop_id = #{workshopId} GROUP BY p.monthly, p.paid_status, s.final_amount, s.adjust_amount ORDER BY p.monthly, p.paid_status

SELECT profit.monthly, program.title, SUM(profit.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(profit.commission_amt) AS commissionAmt, monthly, paid_status FROM profit JOIN program USING(program_id) WHERE profit.workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND monthly=#{monthly} GROUP BY profit.monthly, program.title ,paid_status ORDER BY profit.monthly, program.title

SELECT p.workshop_id, w.name AS workshopName, u.name AS ownerName, p.monthly, p.paid_status, SUM(p.total_amount) AS totalAmount, SUM(p.commission_amt) AS commissionAmt, MAX(s.final_amount) AS finalAmount FROM profit p LEFT JOIN settlement s ON (p.workshop_id = s.workshop_id AND p.monthly = s.monthly) JOIN workshop w ON p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id JOIN user u ON w.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE p.paid_status = '조정' OR p.paid_status = '정산대기' GROUP BY p.workshop_id, w.name, u.name, p.monthly, p.paid_status ORDER BY p.monthly DESC
